sequenceDetails.description: Discovery of Funds
sequenceDetails.mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
  title Personal Loan Discovery
  Borrower Platform (BAP)->>Gateway (BG): search
  Gateway (BG) ->> Borrower Platform (BAP): ACK
  Gateway (BG)->>Registry: Lookup Lender Platforms (lookup)
  Registry->>Gateway (BG): List of Lender Platforms (200 OK)
  Gateway (BG)->>Lender Platform(BPP): search
  Lender Platform(BPP)->>Gateway (BG) : ACK
  Lender Platform(BPP)->>Borrower Platform (BAP): Publish Catalog of Lender 1 (on_search)
  Borrower Platform (BAP)->>Lender Platform(BPP): ACK

sequenceDetails.description: Ordering
sequenceDetails.mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
  title  Selection
  participant Borrower Platform (BAP)
  participant Lender Platform (BPP)
  participant Lender Form Service
  Borrower Platform (BAP)->>Lender Form Service: Get Form(Org Form)
  Lender Form Service-->>Borrower Platform (BAP): Form Received
  Borrower Platform (BAP)->>Lender Form Service: Form Submission
  Lender Form Service-->>Borrower Platform (BAP): Submission ID
  Borrower Platform (BAP)->>Lender Platform (BPP): select(with submissionID)
  Lender Platform (BPP)-->>Borrower Platform (BAP):ACK
  Lender Platform (BPP)->>Borrower Platform (BAP):on_select
  Borrower Platform (BAP)-->>Lender Platform (BPP): ACK

sequenceDetails.description: Initializing the order
sequenceDetails.mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
  title Initializing Order
  participant Borrower Platform (BAP)
  participant Lender Platform (BPP)
  participant Lender Form Service
  Borrower Platform (BAP)->>Lender Form Service: Get Form(KYC)
  Lender Form Service-->>Borrower Platform (BAP): Form Received
  Borrower Platform (BAP)->>Lender Form Service: Form Submission
  Lender Form Service-->>Borrower Platform (BAP): Submission ID
  Borrower Platform (BAP)->>Lender Platform (BPP): init(with submissionID)
  Lender Platform (BPP)-->>Borrower Platform (BAP):ACK
  Lender Platform (BPP)->>Borrower Platform (BAP):on_init
  Borrower Platform (BAP)-->>Lender Platform (BPP): ACK

sequenceDetails.description: Order Confirmation
sequenceDetails.mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
  title Order Confirmation
  participant Borrower Platform (BAP)
  participant Lender Platform (BPP)
  participant Lender Form Service
  Borrower Platform (BAP)->>Lender Form Service: Get Form(Loan agreement)
  Lender Form Service-->>Borrower Platform (BAP): Form Received
  Borrower Platform (BAP)->>Lender Form Service: Form Submission
  Lender Form Service-->>Borrower Platform (BAP): Submission ID
  Borrower Platform (BAP)->>Lender Platform (BPP): confirm(with submissionID)
  Lender Platform (BPP)-->>Borrower Platform (BAP):ACK
  Lender Platform (BPP)->>Borrower Platform (BAP):on_confirm
  Borrower Platform (BAP)-->>Lender Platform (BPP): ACK

sequenceDetails.description: Fulfillment
sequenceDetails.mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
  title MF Ordering - Order Fulfillment
  participant Borrower Platform (BAP)
  participant Lender Platform (BPP)
  Borrower Platform (BAP)->>Lender Platform (BPP): status-Request loan application status
  Lender Platform (BPP)-->>Borrower Platform (BAP):ACK
  Lender Platform (BPP)->>Borrower Platform (BAP):on_status - Provide loan application status
  Borrower Platform (BAP)-->>Lender Platform (BPP): ACK

descriptor.name: Annual Percentage Rate
descriptor.short_desc: Effective annualized interest rate in percentage computed on net disbursed amount using IRR approach and reducing balance method

descriptor.name: Number of installments of repayment
descriptor.short_desc: Number of installments borrower has to make to payback the loan

descriptor.name: cool off period
descriptor.short_desc: Cooling off/look-up period during which borrower shall not be charged any penalty

descriptor.name: Key Facts Statement Link
descriptor.short_desc: A link provided by the BPP points to a Key Fact Statement (KFS) document related to a loan. When accessed, the document is returned in text/html format, with the loan details organized in a standard HTML table. This format makes it easy for the buyer's app to read and reformat the information as needed. For more details, refer to the \"KFS_LINK format\" document in the \"feature-ui\" section.

This format makes it easy for the buyer's app to read and reformat the information as needed. For more details, refer to the \"KFS_LINK format\" document in the \"feature-ui\" section.

descriptor.name: Loan Agreement Document
descriptor.short_desc: Download your Loan Agreement document here,
descriptor.long_desc: A Loan Agreement Document is a legal contract outlining terms such as loan amount, interest rate, repayment schedule, and collateral, binding a lender and borrower in a formal financial arrangement.

descriptor.name: Loan Cancellation Document
descriptor.short_desc: Download your Loan Cancellation document here,
descriptor.long_desc: A Loan Cancellation Document is a formal agreement used to terminate an existing loan, releasing the borrower from repayment obligations and confirming the loan's cancellation.

It specifies the time of request generation in RFC3339 format. RFC3339 is a date and time format defined by the Internet Engineering Task Force (IETF) in the RFC 3339 standard.
 YYYY: Four-digit year
 MM: Two-digit month (01-12)
 DD: Two-digit day of the month (01-31)
 T: Separator between the date and time
 HH: Two-digit hour (00-23)

It specifies the time of request generation in RFC3339 format. RFC3339 is a date and time format defined by the Internet Engineering Task Force (IETF) in the RFC 3339 standard.
 YYYY: Four-digit year
 MM: Two-digit month (01-12)
 DD: Two-digit day of the month (01-31)
 T: Separator between the date and time
 HH: Two-digit hour (00-23)
 MM: Two-digit minute (00-59)
 SS: Two-digit second (00-59)
 .sss: Fractional seconds (optional)
 Z: Indicates the time is in UTC (optional; the time may also include an offset)

Specifies the validity duration of this message in ISO8601 format, after timestamp.
 In the case of "PT30S," it represents a duration of 30 seconds. Here's a breakdown of the components:
 
 - "P" indicates the period.
 - "T" indicates the time part.
 - "30S" represents 30 seconds.
 
 So, "PT30S" signifies a duration of 30 seconds.
